description: 流程引擎死信队列表，记录所有重试次数耗尽、彻底失败无法自动恢复的任务
business_context: 这是流程引擎的故障诊断中心！当异步任务重试多次后仍然失败（通常是重试3次后），会从 act_ru_job 表移动到此死信队列。死信队列中的任务代表系统性错误或外部依赖故障，必须人工干预才能恢复。死信队列的长度是系统健康度的关键指标：健康系统应该保持死信队列为空或接近为空。如果死信队列持续增长，说明存在需要紧急修复的问题。通过分析死信队列可以发现：最常见的失败原因、受影响最严重的流程定义、外部接口的可靠性问题等。
row_count_estimate: 理想情况下应该为0或接近0。如果持续积累说明存在系统性问题。

indexes.name: act_idx_deadletter_job_process_instance_id
indexes.description: 流程实例ID索引，用于快速查询某个流程的死信任务

indexes.name: act_idx_deadletter_job_proc_def_id
indexes.description: 流程定义ID索引，用于统计哪些流程设计最容易产生死信任务

indexes.name: act_idx_deadletter_job_exception_stack_id
indexes.description: 异常堆栈ID索引，用于快速查询失败原因

columns.name: id_
columns.description: 死信任务唯一标识符（主键）
columns.business_meaning: 每个进入死信队列的任务的唯一ID，原本来自 act_ru_job 表

columns.name: rev_
columns.business_meaning: 用于并发控制

columns.name: category_
columns.business_meaning: 标识任务的类别

columns.name: type_
columns.business_meaning: 定义任务的具体类型

possible_values.description: 异步延续任务 - 最常见的死信类型
possible_values.usage_scenario: 异步服务任务调用外部接口失败
possible_values.performance_note: 如果此类型死信大量增加，说明外部服务不稳定

possible_values.usage_scenario: 定时器触发的任务执行失败

columns.usage_hint: 按 type_ 分组统计可以识别哪种类型的任务最容易失败

columns.name: exclusive_
columns.business_meaning: 如果为 true，则同一流程实例的其他独占任务必须等待此任务完成
columns.usage_hint: 独占任务进入死信会阻塞整个流程实例

columns.name: execution_id_
columns.business_meaning: 关联到 act_ru_execution 表

columns.name: process_instance_id_
columns.business_meaning: 关联到 pe_ext_procinst 表的 id 字段，标识任务所属的流程实例
columns.usage_hint: 通过此字段可以找到被死信任务阻塞的流程实例

columns.name: proc_def_id_
columns.business_meaning: 关联到流程定义表，标识任务所属的流程定义
columns.usage_hint: 按流程定义分组统计死信数量，识别设计缺陷或外部依赖问题

columns.name: element_id_
columns.business_meaning: BPMN模型中定义的活动节点ID（如'ServiceTask_1'）
columns.usage_hint: 精确定位是哪个活动节点产生的死信任务

columns.name: element_name_
columns.business_meaning: BPMN模型中定义的活动节点可读名称（如'调用支付接口'）
columns.usage_hint: 故障报告中优先显示此名称，比 element_id_ 更易理解

columns.name: scope_id_
columns.business_meaning: 任务的作用域标识

columns.name: sub_scope_id_
columns.business_meaning: 子作用域标识

columns.name: scope_type_
columns.business_meaning: 作用域的类型标识

columns.name: scope_definition_id_
columns.business_meaning: 作用域定义的标识

columns.name: correlation_id_
columns.business_meaning: 用于关联相关任务或事件

columns.name: exception_stack_id_
columns.business_meaning: 关联到 act_ge_bytearray 表，存储完整的异常堆栈信息
columns.usage_hint: 所有死信任务都应该有异常堆栈信息，用于诊断失败原因

columns.name: exception_msg_
columns.business_meaning: 任务失败时的错误消息摘要（最多4000字符）
columns.usage_hint: 按异常消息分组统计是找出系统性问题的关键方法

columns.name: duedate_
columns.business_meaning: 任务原本应该执行的时间点（用于定时器任务）
columns.usage_hint: 对比 duedate_ 和 create_time_ 可以了解任务是否在预期时间点失败

columns.name: repeat_
columns.business_meaning: 定时器的重复执行规则

columns.name: handler_type_
columns.business_meaning: 执行该任务的处理器类型（Java类名）
columns.usage_hint: 按处理器类型统计可以识别哪些处理器最不稳定

columns.name: handler_cfg_
columns.business_meaning: 传递给处理器的配置信息

columns.name: custom_values_id_
columns.business_meaning: 关联到 act_ge_bytearray 表

columns.name: create_time_
columns.business_meaning: 任务从 act_ru_job 移动到死信队列的时间戳
columns.usage_hint: 对比 create_time_ 和 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP 可以计算任务在死信队列中停留的时长

columns.name: tenant_id_
columns.business_meaning: 多租户环境下的租户标识
columns.usage_hint: 生成SQL时，默认添加 tenant_id_ 过滤

relationships.description: 死信任务所属的流程实例
relationships.usage_hint: 通过此关联可以找到被死信任务阻塞的流程

relationships.description: 死信任务所属的执行实例
死信任务所属的流程定义
异常堆栈信息，诊断失败原因的关键

common_queries.description: 查询死信队列的健康状态（关键KPI）
common_queries.sql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_deadletter_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT process_instance_id_) as affected_processes,
  COUNT(DISTINCT proc_def_id_) as affected_process_definitions,
  MIN(create_time_) as oldest_deadletter_time,
  MAX(create_time_) as latest_deadletter_time,
  ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - create_time_))))::numeric, 2) as avg_age_seconds
FROM act_ru_deadletter_job
WHERE tenant_id_ = 'your_tenant_id'
common_queries.business_scenario: 系统健康检查：了解死信队列的总体情况，理想情况下应该为0
common_queries.expected_result: 健康系统：total_deadletter_count = 0 或接近0，如果 > 100 说明存在严重问题

common_queries.description: 按流程定义统计死信任务数量（找出问题流程）
common_queries.sql:
SELECT 
  proc_def_id_,
  COUNT(*) as deadletter_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT process_instance_id_) as affected_process_count,
  MIN(create_time_) as first_occurrence,
  MAX(create_time_) as last_occurrence,
  ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - create_time_)) / 3600.0))::numeric, 2) as avg_age_hours
FROM act_ru_deadletter_job
WHERE tenant_id_ = 'your_tenant_id'
GROUP BY proc_def_id_
ORDER BY deadletter_count DESC
LIMIT 20
common_queries.business_scenario: 识别哪些流程定义产生了最多的死信任务，定位设计缺陷或外部依赖问题
common_queries.expected_result: 某些流程定义的死信数量异常多，需要优化流程设计或外部接口调用

common_queries.description: 按异常消息分组统计失败原因（根因分析）
common_queries.sql:
SELECT 
  LEFT(exception_msg_, 150) as exception_summary,
  COUNT(*) as occurrence_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT process_instance_id_) as affected_processes,
  COUNT(DISTINCT proc_def_id_) as affected_definitions,
  MIN(create_time_) as first_occurrence,
  MAX(create_time_) as last_occurrence,
  ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT element_name_) FILTER (WHERE element_name_ IS NOT NULL) as failing_activities
FROM act_ru_deadletter_job
WHERE tenant_id_ = 'your_tenant_id'
GROUP BY LEFT(exception_msg_, 150)
ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC
LIMIT 20
common_queries.business_scenario: 找出最常见的失败原因，识别需要修复的系统性错误
common_queries.expected_result: 可以看到主要的错误类型，如'Connection timeout'、'Service unavailable'、'NullPointerException'等

common_queries.description: 查询最近24小时新增的死信任务（趋势监控）
common_queries.sql:
SELECT 
  id_,
  type_,
  element_name_,
  process_instance_id_,
  proc_def_id_,
  LEFT(exception_msg_, 200) as exception_preview,
  create_time_,
  ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - create_time_)) / 60.0)::numeric, 2) as age_minutes
FROM act_ru_deadletter_job
WHERE create_time_ >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND tenant_id_ = 'your_tenant_id'
ORDER BY create_time_ DESC
LIMIT 100
common_queries.business_scenario: 监控死信队列的增长趋势，快速发现新出现的问题
common_queries.expected_result: 如果最近24小时新增大量死信，说明刚刚发生了故障

common_queries.description: 按任务类型统计死信分布
common_queries.sql:
SELECT 
  type_,
  COUNT(*) as deadletter_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT proc_def_id_) as affected_definitions,
  ROUND((100.0 * COUNT(*) / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 0))::numeric, 2) as percentage,
  MIN(create_time_) as first_occurrence,
  MAX(create_time_) as last_occurrence
FROM act_ru_deadletter_job
WHERE tenant_id_ = 'your_tenant_id'
GROUP BY type_
ORDER BY deadletter_count DESC
common_queries.business_scenario: 了解哪种类型的任务最容易进入死信队列
common_queries.expected_result: 通常 async-continuation 类型占比最高，说明异步服务调用是主要失败点

common_queries.description: 查询死信任务的完整异常堆栈信息
common_queries.sql:
SELECT 
  d.id_,
  d.element_name_,
  d.process_instance_id_,
  d.proc_def_id_,
  LEFT(d.exception_msg_, 200) as exception_preview,
  b.name_ as exception_detail_name,
  ROUND((LENGTH(b.bytes_) / 1024.0)::numeric, 2) as exception_stack_size_kb,
  d.create_time_
FROM act_ru_deadletter_job d
INNER JOIN act_ge_bytearray b ON b.id_ = d.exception_stack_id_
WHERE d.tenant_id_ = 'your_tenant_id'
ORDER BY d.create_time_ DESC
LIMIT 50
common_queries.business_scenario: 获取详细的异常堆栈信息，辅助开发人员诊断和修复问题
common_queries.expected_result: 可以查看完整的堆栈跟踪，定位代码具体哪一行出错

common_queries.description: 关联流程实例分析死信任务对流程的影响
common_queries.sql:
SELECT 
  p.proc_def_id,
  p.status as process_status,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as process_count,
  COUNT(d.id_) as deadletter_count,
  ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.end_time - p.start_time))))::numeric, 2) as avg_process_duration_seconds,
  ROUND((100.0 * COUNT(d.id_) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.id), 0))::numeric, 2) as deadletter_rate_percentage
FROM pe_ext_procinst p
LEFT JOIN act_ru_deadletter_job d ON d.process_instance_id_ = p.id
WHERE p.start_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND p.tenant_id = 'your_tenant_id'
GROUP BY p.proc_def_id, p.status
HAVING COUNT(d.id_) > 0
ORDER BY deadletter_count DESC
LIMIT 20
common_queries.business_scenario: 分析死信任务对流程成功率和执行时长的影响
common_queries.expected_result: 死信率高的流程通常执行时间更长或状态为失败

common_queries.description: 对比死信队列与正常任务队列（横向对比）
common_queries.sql:
SELECT 
  'Normal Job Queue' as queue_type,
  COUNT(*) as job_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT process_instance_id_) as process_count,
  ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - create_time_))))::numeric, 2) as avg_age_seconds
FROM act_ru_job
WHERE tenant_id_ = 'your_tenant_id'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Dead Letter Queue' as queue_type,
  COUNT(*) as job_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT process_instance_id_) as process_count,
  ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - create_time_))))::numeric, 2) as avg_age_seconds
FROM act_ru_deadletter_job
WHERE tenant_id_ = 'your_tenant_id'
ORDER BY queue_type
common_queries.business_scenario: 对比两个队列的状态，评估系统整体健康度
common_queries.expected_result: 健康系统：Normal Job Queue 有适量任务，Dead Letter Queue 接近为0

ai_analysis_guidelines: 【强制要求】PostgreSQL 9.6的ROUND函数语法：必须在EXTRACT结果后立即添加::numeric类型转换。正确格式：ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - create_time_))::numeric, 2)。对于聚合函数，格式为：ROUND((AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - create_time_))))::numeric, 2)
【强制要求】任何使用ROUND函数的地方，被ROUND的数值表达式必须以::numeric结尾
生成SQL时，默认添加tenant_id_过滤（除非用户明确说明跨租户分析）
计算死信年龄统一使用公式：EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - create_time_))
死信队列健康标准：total_count = 0（理想状态），< 10（可接受），10-100（需要关注），> 100（严重问题）
所有死信任务都应该有 exception_msg_ 和 exception_stack_id_，如果为 NULL 说明数据异常
关联 pe_ext_procinst 表时使用 LEFT JOIN，因为死信任务可能属于已删除的流程实例
关联 act_ge_bytearray 表获取完整异常堆栈：JOIN 条件为 act_ge_bytearray.id_ = act_ru_deadletter_job.exception_stack_id_
按异常消息分组时，使用 LEFT(exception_msg_, 150) 截断过长的消息，便于分组统计
对比 act_ru_job 和 act_ru_deadletter_job 时使用 UNION ALL，了解整体任务队列状态
聚合查询时，建议添加 HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 过滤没有死信的流程定义
分析死信趋势时，按时间段统计：最近1小时、24小时、7天、30天
提供修复建议时，应区分：代码bug（NullPointerException）、外部依赖（Connection timeout）、配置错误（Authentication failed）
关键性能指标：total_count（总数，目标=0）、avg_age（平均年龄，过长说明长期未处理）、deadletter_rate（死信率，目标<1%）
死信任务通常需要人工干预：修复代码bug → 重新部署 → 通过API重置任务 → 重试执行

performance_analysis_use_cases.description: 评估系统是否存在大量失败任务
performance_analysis_use_cases.analysis_approach: 统计死信队列总数和增长趋势，如果持续增长说明存在未修复的系统性问题

performance_analysis_use_cases.description: 找出最常见的失败原因
performance_analysis_use_cases.analysis_approach: 按 exception_msg_ 分组统计，识别出最频繁的错误类型，优先修复影响最大的问题

performance_analysis_use_cases.description: 识别哪些流程设计最不稳定
performance_analysis_use_cases.analysis_approach: 按 proc_def_id_ 分组统计死信数量，死信率高的流程需要重新设计或加强错误处理

performance_analysis_use_cases.description: 评估外部接口的稳定性
performance_analysis_use_cases.analysis_approach: 分析异常消息中的超时、连接失败等错误，识别不可靠的外部服务

performance_analysis_use_cases.description: 决定哪些死信任务可以安全删除
performance_analysis_use_cases.analysis_approach: 按年龄和流程状态分析，超过30天且流程已完成的死信可以考虑归档或删除

performance_analysis_use_cases.description: 评估团队对死信任务的响应速度
performance_analysis_use_cases.analysis_approach: 统计死信任务从创建到解决的平均时长，优化故障响应流程

cte_templates.description: 死信队列分析的 CTE 模板

exception_root_cause.name: 异常根因分析
exception_root_cause.template:
WITH exception_groups AS (
  SELECT
    LEFT(exception_msg_, 100) as exception_category,
    COUNT(*) as occurrence_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT process_instance_id_) as affected_processes,
    MIN(create_time_) as first_seen,
    MAX(create_time_) as last_seen
  FROM act_ru_deadletter_job
  WHERE tenant_id_ = '{tenant_id}'
    AND exception_msg_ IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY LEFT(exception_msg_, 100)
)
SELECT *
FROM exception_groups
ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC
LIMIT 20
exception_root_cause.use_case: 快速识别最常见的失败原因

deadletter_with_process_context.name: 死信任务与流程上下文
deadletter_with_process_context.template:
WITH deadletter_context AS (
  SELECT
    d.id_,
    d.element_name_,
    d.exception_msg_,
    d.create_time_ as deadletter_time,
    p.proc_def_id,
    p.start_time as process_start,
    p.status as process_status,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.end_time - p.start_time)) as process_duration
  FROM act_ru_deadletter_job d
  LEFT JOIN pe_ext_procinst p ON p.id = d.process_instance_id_
  WHERE d.tenant_id_ = '{tenant_id}'
    AND d.create_time_ >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '{time_range}'
)
SELECT * FROM deadletter_context
ORDER BY deadletter_time DESC
deadletter_with_process_context.use_case: 查看死信任务的完整业务上下文
